root_cause: show-latest-chain uses deterministic report directory identity and mandatory append-only unified replay reconstruction report persistence, so repeated invocation with the same created_at collides with existing report artifacts.

determinations.failure_cause: Architectural coupling of read-style inspection to mandatory append-only report creation, implemented through deterministic report directory reuse.

existing_components: Replay wrapper and artifact hash validation.
blocking_gaps: Repeated inspection with same inputs can fail closed.
Read-only status does not distinguish source replay immutability from report persistence.
Collision failure message exposes low-level append-only filename instead of operator recovery guidance.
Regression tests do not cover repeated show-latest-chain invocation.
recommended_fix_order: Split pure reconstruction from persisted report creation.
Make show-* commands pure by default.
Add explicit persisted report mode with unique or certified idempotent report identity.
Add repeated inspection and no-write regression tests.

validation_commands.command: Review-only source inspection with rg and sed.
validation_commands.summary: Chain inspection, unified replay reconstruction, tests, and existing certification artifacts were inspected. The failing command was not executed to preserve the no-runtime-mutation requirement.
